titles.title: I Will Lift My Hands to You

authors.author: Bruce Ellis
Bruce Ellis
Herr, ich will dich ehrn (Ich erhebe meine Hände)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will lift my hands to You saying Father I love You Father I need You I will lift my voice and sing I will sing of Your glory The glory of my King

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will worship You (I will worship You) Worship and adore You I will worship You (I will worship You) Lay my life before You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'll bow my head before Your glory Worship at Your feet I'll declare that You are worthy Set my eyes on You alone and
